title: On One Who Affected An Effeminate Manner
content:
While man and woman still are incomplete,
I prize that soul where man and woman meet,
Which types all Nature�s male and female plan,
But, friend, man-woman is not woman-man.
meaning:
"On One Who Affected An Effeminate Manner" is a quintessential example of Alfred Lord Tennyson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
